item.title: Download Starus Data Restore Pack 5.0
item.description: Starus Data Restore Pack is a software that creates a full snapshot of the disk being restored to perform the restore operation on the virtual image instead of the actual disc. This allows to minimize any potential negative effects that a wide range of read operations can do on the damaged drive. Starus Data Restore Pack is the fastest data recovery software on the market. With new and improved disk analysis algorithms, data recovery products can locate and list deleted files and folders...

item.title: Download dbForge Data Generator for Oracle 2025.3.107
item.description: dbForge Data Generator for Oracle is a small but powerful GUI tool for populating Oracle schemas with large amounts of actual test data. Having a rich collection of more than 200 predefined and customizable data generators for various data types, it provides fast and flawless data generation (including random number generator) in an easy to use interface. The data generator provides flexible options and templates to create and use your own generator to better suit your...

item.title: Download dbForge Documenter for Oracle 2025.3.107
item.description: dbForge Documenter for Oracle is a handy visualization tool for creating customizable documentation for Oracle databases. This Oracle documentation tool automatically generates documentation of the entire Oracle database in HTML, PDF, and Markdown file formats. item.title: Download Starus RAID Restore 2.9
item.description: Starus RAID Restore is a program to recover data from inactive RAID systems or from disks in those systems. item.title: Download dbForge Query Builder for MySQL 2025.3.107
item.description: dbForge Query Builder for MySQL is a visualization tool that allows to create any type of MySQL query, from simple lookup to complex JOIN. The tool offers extensive compatibility options and helps build and edit complex MySQL queries with just a few clicks. You don't have to sweat building complex code - just "draw" your query on a diagram. item.title: Download dbForge Schema Compare for SQL Server 2025.3.107
item.description: dbForge Schema Compare for SQL Server is a reliable database schema comparison tool that saves you time and effort when comparing and synchronizing SQL Server databases . SQL Compare lets you work with live SQL Server databases, snapshots, script directories, and native backups. item.title: Download dbForge Unit Test for SQL Server 2025.3.107
item.description: dbForge Unit Test for SQL Server is an intuitive and convenient GUI for deploying automated unit testing in SQL Server Management Studio. The SQL database unit testing tool dbForge is based on the open source tSQLt framework, so SQL developers can now benefit from writing unit tests in regular T-SQL. The functionality of Unit Tests allows you to develop stable and reliable code that can be accurately regression tested at the unit level. Features of dbForge Unit Test for SQL...
